title: MagicBricks is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: MagicBricks is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the MagicBricks family as a Full Stack Developer in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MagicBricks:
MagicBricks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks!
